docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2025 VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LE TRUC VO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL JAMES EUL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VO, LE TRUC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EUL, MICHAEL JAMES $4,987.54 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,987.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EUL, MICHAEL JAMES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VO, LE TRUC AS TO DEFENDANT EUL, MICHAEL JAMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-05-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EUL, MICHAEL JAMES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,987.54 FILED BY VO, LE TRUC AS TO DEFENDANT EUL, MICHAEL JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
